Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 752}They say the end will come soon, but I can't imagine what it'll look like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 752}If it was going to be like a big earthquake or a tsunami, I'd be scared...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 752}But if you believe, you'll be saved, right?[n]{f 1 1}
